notes: Generated by FLéX PokéAPI Data Builder.
Upload files into /data in the GitHub Pages repository.
Moves include IDs 1-354; 354 is Psycho Boost.

species.name: bulbasaur
species.flavor_text: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this POKéMON is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

species.name: ivysaur
species.flavor_text: There is a plant bulb on its back. When it absorbs nutrients, the bulb is said to blossom into a large flower.

species.name: venusaur
species.flavor_text: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.

species.name: charmander
species.flavor_text: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

species.name: charmeleon
species.flavor_text: It lashes about with its tail to knock down its foe. It then tears up the fallen opponent with sharp claws.

species.name: charizard
species.flavor_text: Its wings can carry this POKéMON close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

species.name: squirtle
species.flavor_text: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

species.name: wartortle
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON is very popular as a pet. Its fur-covered tail is a symbol of its longevity.

species.name: blastoise
species.flavor_text: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

species.name: caterpie
species.flavor_text: It is covered with a green skin. When it grows, it sheds the skin, covers itself with silk, and becomes a cocoon.

species.name: metapod
species.flavor_text: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.

species.name: butterfree
species.flavor_text: The wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this POKéMON can fly about even in rain.

species.name: weedle
species.flavor_text: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

species.name: kakuna
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON is in a temporary stage while making its body. It is almost completely unable to move on its own.

species.name: beedrill
species.flavor_text: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.

species.name: pidgey
species.flavor_text: Does not like to fight. It hides in tall grass and so on, foraging for food such as small bugs.

species.name: pidgeotto
species.flavor_text: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as an EXEGGCUTE to its nest over 60 miles away.

species.name: pidgeot
species.flavor_text: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.

species.name: rattata
species.flavor_text: Its fangs are long and very sharp. They grow continuously, so it gnaws on hard things to whittle them down.

species.name: raticate
species.flavor_text: Its rear feet have three toes each. They are webbed, enabling it to swim across rivers.

species.name: spearow
species.flavor_text: It busily flits around here and there. Even if it is frail, it can be a tough foe that uses MIRROR MOVE.

species.name: fearow
species.flavor_text: Its huge and magnificent wings can keep it aloft in the sky. It can remain flying a whole day without landing.

species.name: ekans
species.flavor_text: A very common sight in grassland, etc. It flicks its tongue in and out to sense danger in its surroundings.

species.name: arbok
species.flavor_text: The pattern on its belly appears to be a frightening face. Weak foes will flee just at the sight of the pattern.

species.name: pikachu
species.flavor_text: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.

species.name: raichu
species.flavor_text: Its electric charges can reach even 100,000 volts. Careless contact can cause even an Indian elephant to faint.

species.name: sandshrew
species.flavor_text: It burrows and lives underground. If threatened, it curls itself up into a ball for protection.

species.name: sandslash
species.flavor_text: It is adept at attacking with the spines on its back and its sharp claws while quickly scurrying about.

species.name: nidoran-f
species.flavor_text: Though small, it must be treated with caution because of its powerfully toxic barbs. The female has smaller horns.

species.name: nidorina
species.flavor_text: The female has a gentle temperament. It emits ultrasonic cries that have the power to befuddle foes.

species.name: nidoqueen
species.flavor_text: The body is covered by stiff, needle- like scales. If it becomes excited, the needles bristle outwards.

species.name: nidoran-m
species.flavor_text: Its large ears are flapped like wings when it is listening to distant sounds. It extends toxic barbs when angered.

species.name: nidorino
species.flavor_text: It is easily angered. By swinging its well- developed horn wildly, it can even punch through diamond.

species.name: nidoking
species.flavor_text: It is recognized by its rock-hard hide and its extended horn. Be careful with the horn as it contains venom.

species.name: clefairy
species.flavor_text: Its adorable appearance makes it popular as a pet. However, it is rare and difficult to find.

species.name: clefable
species.flavor_text: It has an acute sense of hearing. It can easily hear a pin being dropped nearly 1,100 yards away.

species.name: vulpix
species.flavor_text: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

species.name: ninetales
species.flavor_text: It has nine long tails and fur that gleams gold. It is said to live for 1,000 years.

species.name: jigglypuff
species.flavor_text: It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.

species.name: wigglytuff
species.flavor_text: Its fur is extremely fine, dense, and supple. The exquisitely pleasant fur conveys an image of luxury.

species.name: zubat
species.flavor_text: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echo location to flit about in darkness.

species.name: golbat
species.flavor_text: It clamps down on its prey with needle- sharp fangs and drains over 10 ounces of blood in one gulp.

species.name: oddish
species.flavor_text: Its scientific name is “Oddium Wanderus.” At night, it is said to walk nearly 1,000 feet on its two roots.

species.name: gloom
species.flavor_text: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

species.name: vileplume
species.flavor_text: Its petals are the largest in the world. It fiendishly scatters allergy-causing pollen from its petals.

species.name: paras
species.flavor_text: Growing out of the bug’s back are mushrooms called tochukaso. The mushrooms grow with the bug host.

species.name: parasect
species.flavor_text: It scatters toxic spores from the mushroom cap. In China, the spores are used as herbal medicine.

species.name: venonat
species.flavor_text: Its eyes act as radar, enabling it to be active in darkness. The eyes can also shoot powerful beams.

species.name: venomoth
species.flavor_text: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

species.name: diglett
species.flavor_text: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.

species.name: dugtrio
species.flavor_text: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

species.name: meowth
species.flavor_text: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

species.name: persian
species.flavor_text: Has a vicious temperament. Beware if it raises its tail straight up. It is a signal that it is about to pounce and bite.

species.name: psyduck
species.flavor_text: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

species.name: golduck
species.flavor_text: The forelegs are webbed, helping to make it an adept swimmer. It can be seen swimming elegantly in lakes, etc.

species.name: mankey
species.flavor_text: Light and agile on its feet, and ferocious in temperament. When angered, it flies into an uncontrollable frenzy.

species.name: primeape
species.flavor_text: It is always outrageously furious. If it gives chase, it will tenaciously track the target no matter how far.

species.name: growlithe
species.flavor_text: Very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.

species.name: arcanine
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON that is described in Chinese legends. It is said to race at an unbelievable speed.

species.name: poliwag
species.flavor_text: Its slick black skin is thin and damp. A part of its internal organs can be seen through the skin as a spiral pattern.

species.name: poliwhirl
species.flavor_text: Its two legs are well developed. Even though it can live on the ground, it prefers living in water.

species.name: poliwrath
species.flavor_text: An adept swimmer, it knows the front crawl, butterfly, and more. It is faster than the best human swimmers.

species.name: abra
species.flavor_text: It sleeps for 18 hours a day. It uses a variety of extrasensory powers even while asleep.

species.name: kadabra
species.flavor_text: It happened one morning - a boy with extrasensory powers awoke in bed transformed into KADABRA.

species.name: alakazam
species.flavor_text: It does not like physical attacks very much. Instead, it freely uses extra­ sensory powers to defeat foes.

species.name: machop
species.flavor_text: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

species.name: machoke
species.flavor_text: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

species.name: machamp
species.flavor_text: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.

species.name: bellsprout
species.flavor_text: Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.

species.name: weepinbell
species.flavor_text: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

species.name: victreebel
species.flavor_text: Lures prey into its mouth with a honeylike aroma. The helpless prey is melted with a dissolving fluid.

species.name: tentacool
species.flavor_text: Its eyes are as transparent as crystals. From them, it shoots mysterious beams of light.

species.name: tentacruel
species.flavor_text: It has 80 tentacles that move about freely. They can sting, causing poisoning and sharp, stabbing pain.

species.name: geodude
species.flavor_text: Its round form makes it easy to pick up. Some people have used them to hurl at each other in a snowball fight.

species.name: graveler
species.flavor_text: Be careful while hiking on mountain trails. GRAVELER may come rolling down the path without slowing.

species.name: golem
species.flavor_text: It is enclosed in a hard shell that is as rugged as slabs of rock. It sheds skin once a year to grow larger.

species.name: ponyta
species.flavor_text: Its body is light, and its legs are incredibly powerful. It can clear Ayers Rock in one leap.

species.name: rapidash
species.flavor_text: It can gallop at a top speed of 150 miles per hour. It can race as fast as a bullet train while ablaze.

species.name: slowpoke
species.flavor_text: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

species.name: slowbro
species.flavor_text: When a SLOWPOKE went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a SHELLDER. That made it evolve into SLOWBRO.

species.name: magnemite
species.flavor_text: It moves while constantly hovering. It discharges THUNDER WAVE and so on from the units at its sides.

species.name: magneton
species.flavor_text: A linked cluster formed of several MAGNEMITE. It discharges powerful magnetic waves at high voltage.

species.name: farfetchd
species.flavor_text: It always walks about with a plant stalk clamped in its beak. The stalk is used for building its nest.

species.name: doduo
species.flavor_text: A two-headed POKéMON that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

species.name: dodrio
species.flavor_text: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

species.name: seel
species.flavor_text: Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: dewgong
species.flavor_text: Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.

species.name: grimer
species.flavor_text: Sludge exposed to X rays from the moon transformed into GRIMER. It loves feeding on filthy things.

species.name: muk
species.flavor_text: It is usually undetectable because it blends in with the ground. Touching it can cause terrible poisoning.

species.name: shellder
species.flavor_text: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.

species.name: cloyster
species.flavor_text: Its shell is extremely hard. It cannot be shattered, even with a bomb. The shell opens only when it is attacking.

species.name: gastly
species.flavor_text: A being that exists as a thin gas. It can topple an Indian elephant by enveloping the prey in two seconds.

species.name: haunter
species.flavor_text: If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, HAUNTER is there.

species.name: gengar
species.flavor_text: It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.

species.name: onix
species.flavor_text: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.

species.name: drowzee
species.flavor_text: A descendent of the legendary animal baku, which is said to eat dreams. It is skilled at hypnotism.

species.name: hypno
species.flavor_text: It carries a pendulum-like device. There once was an incident in which it took away a child it hypnotized.

species.name: krabby
species.flavor_text: It can be found near the sea. The large pincers grow back if they are torn out of their sockets.

species.name: kingler
species.flavor_text: Its large and hard pincer has 10,000- horsepower strength. However, being so big, it is unwieldy to move.

species.name: voltorb
species.flavor_text: A life-form whose identity is unknown. It is said to SCREECH or suddenly SELFDESTRUCT.

species.name: electrode
species.flavor_text: It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of “The Bomb Ball.”

species.name: exeggcute
species.flavor_text: Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life- form more like plant seeds.

species.name: exeggutor
species.flavor_text: It is called “The Walking Tropical Rainforest.” Each of the nuts has a face and a will of its own.

species.name: cubone
species.flavor_text: It wears the skull of its dead mother on its head. When it becomes lonesome, it is said to cry loudly.

species.name: marowak
species.flavor_text: It is small and was originally very weak. Its temperament turned ferocious when it began using bones.

species.name: hitmonlee
species.flavor_text: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

species.name: hitmonchan
species.flavor_text: The spirit of a pro boxer has infused this POKéMON. It throws punches that are faster than a bullet train.

species.name: lickitung
species.flavor_text: Its tongue is twice the length of its body. It can be moved like an arm for grabbing food and attacking.

species.name: koffing
species.flavor_text: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.

species.name: weezing
species.flavor_text: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small KOFFING twins becoming conjoined as a WEEZING.

species.name: rhyhorn
species.flavor_text: Strong, but not too bright, this POKéMON can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging TACKLES.

species.name: rhydon
species.flavor_text: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

species.name: chansey
species.flavor_text: It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.

species.name: tangela
species.flavor_text: Blue plant vines cloak the POKéMON’s identity in a tangled mass. It entangles anything that gets close.

species.name: kangaskhan
species.flavor_text: The female raises its offspring in a pouch on its belly. It is skilled at attacking using COMET PUNCH.

species.name: horsea
species.flavor_text: It maintains balance using its tail, which is wound up like a coil. It may spray ink from its mouth.

species.name: seadra
species.flavor_text: Its body bristles with sharp spikes. Carelessly trying to touch it could cause fainting from the spikes.

species.name: goldeen
species.flavor_text: Its dorsal and pectoral fins are strongly developed like muscles. It can swim at a speed of five knots.

species.name: seaking
species.flavor_text: The horn on its head is sharp like a drill. It bores a hole in a boulder to make its nest.

species.name: staryu
species.flavor_text: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.

species.name: starmie
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON has a geometric body. Because of its body, the locals suspect that it is an alien creature.

species.name: mr-mime
species.flavor_text: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

species.name: scyther
species.flavor_text: It tears and shreds prey with its wickedly sharp scythes. It very rarely spreads its wings to fly.

species.name: jynx
species.flavor_text: It speaks using a language that sounds human. Research is under way to determine what is being said.

species.name: electabuzz
species.flavor_text: It loves to feed on strong electricity. It occasionally appears around large power plants and so on.

species.name: magmar
species.flavor_text: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather’s body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: pinsir
species.flavor_text: Its two long pincer horns are powerful. Once they grip an enemy, they won’t release until the foe is torn.

species.name: tauros
species.flavor_text: When it is about to TACKLE, it whips its body repeatedly with its three long tails.

species.name: magikarp
species.flavor_text: It is virtually worthless in terms of both power and speed. It is the most weak and pathetic POKéMON in the world.

species.name: gyarados
species.flavor_text: It has an extremely aggressive nature. The HYPER BEAM it shoots from its mouth totally incinerates all targets.

species.name: lapras
species.flavor_text: Its high intelligence enables it to understand human speech. It likes to ferry people on its back.

species.name: ditto
species.flavor_text: It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to transform into other life- forms.

species.name: eevee
species.flavor_text: An extremely rare POKéMON that may evolve in a number of different ways depending on stimuli.

species.name: vaporeon
species.flavor_text: Its body’s cellular structure is similar to the molecular composition of water. It can melt invisibly in water.

species.name: jolteon
species.flavor_text: If it is angered or startled, the fur all over its body bristles like sharp needles that pierce foes.

species.name: flareon
species.flavor_text: It has a flame bag inside its body. After inhaling deeply, it blows out flames of nearly 3,100 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: porygon
species.flavor_text: Using the most advanced technologies, scientists finally succeeded in making the first artificial POKéMON.

species.name: omanyte
species.flavor_text: A prehistoric POKéMON that lived in the primordial sea, it swims by twisting its 10 tentacles about.

species.name: omastar
species.flavor_text: Its tentacles are highly developed as if they are hands and feet. As soon as it ensnares prey, it bites.

species.name: kabuto
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON was regenerated from the fossil of an ancient creature. It protects itself with a hard shell.

species.name: kabutops
species.flavor_text: It swims freely through water. It catches prey with its scythe-like arms and drains the victim’s fluids.

species.name: aerodactyl
species.flavor_text: It was regenerated from a dinosaur’s genetic matter that was found in amber. It flies with high-pitched cries.

species.name: snorlax
species.flavor_text: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

species.name: articuno
species.flavor_text: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. With its long tail trailing behind, its flying form is magnificent.

species.name: zapdos
species.flavor_text: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. While it is flying, it makes crackling and snapping sounds.

species.name: moltres
species.flavor_text: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. Those seeing it are overwhelmed by its orange wings that seem to be on fire.

species.name: dratini
species.flavor_text: Even the young can exceed 6.5 feet in length. It grows larger by repeatedly shedding skin.

species.name: dragonair
species.flavor_text: It is said to live in seas and lakes. Even though it has no wings, it has been seen flying occasionally.

species.name: dragonite
species.flavor_text: It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.

species.name: mewtwo
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON whose genetic code was repeatedly recombined for research. It turned vicious as a result.

species.name: mew
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON of South America that was thought to have been extinct. It is very intelligent and learns any move.

species.name: chikorita
species.flavor_text: Its pleasantly aromatic leaves have the ability to check the humidity and temperature.

species.name: bayleef
species.flavor_text: A spicy aroma emanates from around its neck. The aroma acts as a stimulant to restore health.

species.name: meganium
species.flavor_text: MEGANIUM’s breath has the power to revive dead grass and plants. It can make them healthy again.

species.name: cyndaquil
species.flavor_text: It usually stays hunched over. If it is angry or surprised, it shoots flames out of its back.

species.name: quilava
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON is fully covered by nonflammable fur. It can withstand any kind of fire attack.

species.name: typhlosion
species.flavor_text: It has a secret, devastating move. It rubs its blazing fur together to cause huge explosions.

species.name: totodile
species.flavor_text: It is small but rough and tough. It won’t hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

species.name: croconaw
species.flavor_text: It opens its huge jaws wide when attacking. If it loses any fangs while biting, they grow back in.

species.name: feraligatr
species.flavor_text: It is hard for it to support its own weight out of water, so it gets down on all fours. But it moves fast.

species.name: sentret
species.flavor_text: It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.

species.name: furret
species.flavor_text: There is no telling where its tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunting RATTATA.

species.name: hoothoot
species.flavor_text: It has a perfect sense of time. Whatever happens, it keeps rhythm by precisely tilting its head in time.

species.name: noctowl
species.flavor_text: When it needs to think, it rotates its head 180 degrees to sharpen its intellectual power.

species.name: ledyba
species.flavor_text: When the weather turns cold, numerous LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.

species.name: ledian
species.flavor_text: The star patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.

species.name: spinarak
species.flavor_text: It spins a web using fine--but durable-- thread. It then waits patiently for prey to be trapped.

species.name: ariados
species.flavor_text: A single strand of a special string is endlessly spun out of its rear. The string leads back to its nest.

species.name: crobat
species.flavor_text: The development of wings on its legs enables it to fly fast but also makes it tough to stop and rest.

species.name: chinchou
species.flavor_text: On the dark ocean floor, its only means of communication is its constantly flashing lights.

species.name: lanturn
species.flavor_text: It blinds prey with an intense burst of light, then swallows the immobilized prey in a single gulp.

species.name: pichu
species.flavor_text: Despite its small size, it can zap even adult humans. However, if it does so, it also surprises itself.

species.name: cleffa
species.flavor_text: When numerous meteors illuminate the night sky, sightings of CLEFFA strangely increase.

species.name: igglybuff
species.flavor_text: Its extremely flexible and elastic body makes it bounce continuously--anytime, anywhere.

species.name: togepi
species.flavor_text: A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.

species.name: togetic
species.flavor_text: It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.

species.name: natu
species.flavor_text: It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.

species.name: xatu
species.flavor_text: In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.

species.name: mareep
species.flavor_text: Its fleece grows continually. In the summer, the fleece is fully shed, but it grows back in a week.

species.name: flaaffy
species.flavor_text: Its fluffy fleece easily stores electricity. Its rubbery hide keeps it from being electrocuted.

species.name: ampharos
species.flavor_text: The bright light on its tail can be seen far away. It has been treasured since ancient times as a beacon.

species.name: bellossom
species.flavor_text: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

species.name: marill
species.flavor_text: The end of its tail serves as a buoy that keeps it from drowning, even in a vicious current.

species.name: azumarill
species.flavor_text: When it plays in water, it rolls up its elongated ears to prevent their insides from getting wet.

species.name: sudowoodo
species.flavor_text: It disguises itself as a tree to avoid attack. It hates water, so it will disappear if it starts raining.

species.name: politoed
species.flavor_text: Whenever three or more of these get together, they sing in a loud voice that sounds like bellowing.

species.name: hoppip
species.flavor_text: Its body is so light, it must grip the ground firmly with its feet to keep from being blown away.

species.name: skiploom
species.flavor_text: It spreads its petals to absorb sunlight. It also floats in the air to get closer to the sun.

species.name: jumpluff
species.flavor_text: It drifts on seasonal winds and spreads its cotton-like spores all over the world to make more offspring.

species.name: aipom
species.flavor_text: It lives atop tall trees. When leaping from branch to branch, it deftly uses its tail for balance.

species.name: sunkern
species.flavor_text: It lives by drinking only dewdrops from under the leaves of plants. It is said that it eats nothing else.

species.name: sunflora
species.flavor_text: In the daytime, it rushes about in a hectic manner, but it comes to a complete stop when the sun sets.

species.name: yanma
species.flavor_text: Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.

species.name: wooper
species.flavor_text: When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.

species.name: quagsire
species.flavor_text: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

species.name: espeon
species.flavor_text: By reading air currents, it can predict things such as the weather or its foe’s next move.

species.name: umbreon
species.flavor_text: When darkness falls, the rings on its body begin to glow, striking fear in the hearts of anyone nearby.

species.name: murkrow
species.flavor_text: It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.

species.name: slowking
species.flavor_text: When its head was bitten, toxins entered SLOWPOKE’s head and unlocked an extraordinary power.

species.name: misdreavus
species.flavor_text: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

species.name: unown
species.flavor_text: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.

species.name: wobbuffet
species.flavor_text: To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.

species.name: girafarig
species.flavor_text: Its tail, which also contains a small brain, may bite on its own if it notices an alluring smell.

species.name: pineco
species.flavor_text: It hangs and waits for flying-insect prey to come near. It does not move about much on its own.

species.name: forretress
species.flavor_text: It remains immovably rooted to its tree. It scatters pieces of its hard shell to drive its enemies away.

species.name: dunsparce
species.flavor_text: If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can hover just slightly using its wings.

species.name: gligar
species.flavor_text: It usually clings to cliffs. When it spots its prey, it spreads its wings and glides down to attack.

species.name: steelix
species.flavor_text: It is said that if an ONIX lives for over 100 years, its composition changes to become diamond-like.

species.name: snubbull
species.flavor_text: It has an active, playful nature. Many women like to frolic with it because of its affectionate ways.

species.name: granbull
species.flavor_text: Because its fangs are too heavy, it always keeps its head tilted down. However, its BITE is powerful.

species.name: qwilfish
species.flavor_text: The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.

species.name: scizor
species.flavor_text: Its wings are not used for flying. They are flapped at high speed to adjust its body temperature.

species.name: shuckle
species.flavor_text: It stores BERRIES inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.

species.name: heracross
species.flavor_text: Usually docile, but if disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.

species.name: sneasel
species.flavor_text: Vicious in nature, it drives PIDGEY from their nests and feasts on the eggs that are left behind.

species.name: teddiursa
species.flavor_text: Before food becomes scarce in wintertime, its habit is to hoard food in many hidden locations.

species.name: ursaring
species.flavor_text: With its ability to distinguish any smell, it unfailingly finds all food buried deep underground.

species.name: slugma
species.flavor_text: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

species.name: magcargo
species.flavor_text: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.

species.name: swinub
species.flavor_text: If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.

species.name: piloswine
species.flavor_text: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.

species.name: corsola
species.flavor_text: In a south sea nation, the people live in communities that are built on groups of these POKéMON.

species.name: remoraid
species.flavor_text: Using its dorsal fin as a suction pad, it clings to a MANTINE’s underside to scavenge for leftovers.

species.name: octillery
species.flavor_text: It instinctively sneaks into rocky holes. If it gets sleepy, it steals the nest of a fellow OCTILLERY.

species.name: delibird
species.flavor_text: It nests at the edge of sharp cliffs. It spends all day carrying food to its awaiting chicks.

species.name: mantine
species.flavor_text: Swimming freely in open seas, it may fly out of the water and over the waves if it builds up enough speed.

species.name: skarmory
species.flavor_text: After nesting in bramble bushes, the wings of its chicks grow hard from scratches by thorns.

species.name: houndour
species.flavor_text: To corner prey, they check each other’s location using barks that only they can understand.

species.name: houndoom
species.flavor_text: Upon hearing its eerie howls, other POKéMON get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.

species.name: kingdra
species.flavor_text: It sleeps deep on the ocean floor to build its energy. It is said to cause tornadoes as it wakes.

species.name: phanpy
species.flavor_text: As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.

species.name: donphan
species.flavor_text: The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take a long time to grow.

species.name: porygon2
species.flavor_text: Further research enhanced its abilities. Sometimes, it may exhibit motions that were not programmed.

species.name: stantler
species.flavor_text: Those who stare at its antlers will gradually lose control of their senses and be unable to stand.

species.name: smeargle
species.flavor_text: Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.

species.name: tyrogue
species.flavor_text: Even though it is small, it can’t be ignored because it will slug any handy target without warning.

species.name: hitmontop
species.flavor_text: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

species.name: smoochum
species.flavor_text: It always rocks its head slowly backwards and forwards as if it is trying to kiss someone.

species.name: elekid
species.flavor_text: Even in the most vicious storm, this POKéMON plays happily if thunder rumbles in the sky.

species.name: magby
species.flavor_text: It is found in volcanic craters. Its body heat exceeds 1,100 degrees Fahrenheit, so don’t underestimate it.

species.name: miltank
species.flavor_text: If it has just had a baby, the milk it produces contains much more nutrition than usual.

species.name: blissey
species.flavor_text: It has a very compassionate nature. If it sees a sick POKéMON, it will nurse the sufferer back to health.

species.name: raikou
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON races across the land while barking a cry that sounds like crashing thunder.

species.name: entei
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON that races across the land. It is said that one is born every time a new volcano appears.

species.name: suicune
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON races across the land. It is said that north winds will somehow blow whenever it appears.

species.name: larvitar
species.flavor_text: It is born deep underground. It can’t emerge until it has entirely consumed the soil around it.

species.name: pupitar
species.flavor_text: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.

species.name: tyranitar
species.flavor_text: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

species.name: lugia
species.flavor_text: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

species.name: ho-oh
species.flavor_text: A legend says that its body glows in seven colors. A rainbow is said to form behind it when it flies.

species.name: celebi
species.flavor_text: When CELEBI disappears deep in a forest, it is said to leave behind an egg it brought from the future.

species.name: treecko
species.flavor_text: It quickly scales even vertical walls. It senses humidity with its tail to predict the next day’s weather.

species.name: grovyle
species.flavor_text: Its strongly developed thigh muscles give it astounding agility and jumping performance.

species.name: sceptile
species.flavor_text: The leaves on its forelegs are as sharp as swords. It agilely leaps about the branches of trees to strike.

species.name: torchic
species.flavor_text: It has a flame sac inside its belly that perpetually burns. It feels warm if it is hugged.

species.name: combusken
species.flavor_text: It boosts its concentration by emitting harsh cries. Its kicks have outstanding destructive power.

species.name: blaziken
species.flavor_text: When facing a tough foe, it looses flames from its wrists. Its powerful legs let it jump clear over buildings.

species.name: mudkip
species.flavor_text: Its large tail fin propels it through water with powerful acceleration. It is strong in spite of its size.

species.name: marshtomp
species.flavor_text: It is at its best when on muddy ground with poor footing. It quickly overwhelms foes struggling in mud.

species.name: swampert
species.flavor_text: Its arms are rock-hard. With one swing, they can batter down its foe. It makes its nest on beautiful beaches.

species.name: poochyena
species.flavor_text: It has a very tenacious nature. Its acute sense of smell lets it chase a chosen prey without ever losing track.

species.name: mightyena
species.flavor_text: It will always obey the commands of a skilled TRAINER. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

species.name: zigzagoon
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigs and zags.

species.name: linoone
species.flavor_text: When running in a straight line, it can top 60 miles per hour. However, it has a tough time with curved roads.

species.name: wurmple
species.flavor_text: It lives amidst tall grass and in forests. When attacked, it resists by pointing its venomous spikes at the foe.

species.name: silcoon
species.flavor_text: It conserves its energy by moving as little as possible. It awaits evolution while drinking only a little rainwater.

species.name: beautifly
species.flavor_text: Despite its appearance, it has an aggressive nature. It attacks by jabbing with its long, thin mouth.

species.name: cascoon
species.flavor_text: Its body, which is made of soft silk, hardens over time. When cracks appear, evolution is near.

species.name: dustox
species.flavor_text: It scatters horribly toxic dust when it senses danger. They tend to gather in the glow of streetlamps at night.

species.name: lotad
species.flavor_text: It searches about for clean water. If it does not drink water for too long, the leaf on its head wilts.

species.name: lombre
species.flavor_text: It lives at the water’s edge where it is sunny. It sleeps on a bed of water grass by day and becomes active at night.

species.name: ludicolo
species.flavor_text: The rhythm of bright, festive music activates LUDICOLO’s cells, making it more powerful.

species.name: seedot
species.flavor_text: If it remains still, it becomes impossible to distinguish from real nuts. It delights in surprising foraging PIDGEY.

species.name: nuzleaf
species.flavor_text: They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of NUZLEAF’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.

species.name: shiftry
species.flavor_text: A POKéMON that was feared as a forest guardian. It can read the foe’s mind and take preemptive action.

species.name: taillow
species.flavor_text: It dislikes cold seasons. They migrate to other lands in search of warmth, flying over 180 miles a day.

species.name: swellow
species.flavor_text: If its two tail feathers are standing at attention, it is proof of good health. It soars elegantly in the sky.

species.name: wingull
species.flavor_text: It rides upon ocean winds as if it were a glider. In the winter, it hides food around its nest.

species.name: pelipper
species.flavor_text: It is a flying transporter that carries small POKéMON in its beak. It bobs on the waves to rest its wings.

species.name: ralts
species.flavor_text: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and POKéMON. It hides if it senses hostility.

species.name: kirlia
species.flavor_text: The cheerful spirit of its TRAINER gives it energy for its psychokinetic power. It spins and dances when happy.

species.name: gardevoir
species.flavor_text: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its TRAINER.

species.name: surskit
species.flavor_text: They usually live on ponds, but after an evening shower, they may appear on puddles in towns.

species.name: masquerain
species.flavor_text: The antennae have distinctive patterns that look like eyes. When it rains, they grow heavy, making flight impossible.

species.name: shroomish
species.flavor_text: It prefers damp places. By day it remains still in the forest shade. It releases toxic powder from its head.

species.name: breloom
species.flavor_text: The seeds on its tail are made of toxic spores. It knocks out foes with quick, virtually invisible punches.

species.name: slakoth
species.flavor_text: It sleeps for 20 hours every day. Making drowsy those that see it is one of its abilities.

species.name: vigoroth
species.flavor_text: It is always hungry because it won’t stop rampaging. Even while it is eating, it can’t keep still.

species.name: slaking
species.flavor_text: It is the world’s most slothful POKéMON. However, it can exert horrifying power by releasing pent-up energy all at once.

species.name: nincada
species.flavor_text: Because it lived almost entirely underground, it is nearly blind. It uses its antennae instead.

species.name: ninjask
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON is so quick, it is said to be able to avoid any attack. It loves to feed on tree sap.

species.name: shedinja
species.flavor_text: A most peculiar POKéMON that somehow appears in a POKé BALL when a NINCADA evolves.

species.name: whismur
species.flavor_text: It usually murmurs, but starts crying loudly if it senses danger. It stops when its ear covers are shut.

species.name: loudred
species.flavor_text: When it stamps its feet and bellows, it generates ultrasonic waves that can blow apart a house.

species.name: exploud
species.flavor_text: It emits a variety of sounds from the holes all over its body. Its loud cries can be heard from over six miles away.

species.name: makuhita
species.flavor_text: It grows stronger by enduring harsh training. It is a gutsy POKéMON that can withstand any attack.

species.name: hariyama
species.flavor_text: It stomps on the ground to build power. It can send a 10-ton truck flying with a straight-arm punch.

species.name: azurill
species.flavor_text: It battles by flinging around its tail, which is bigger than its body. The tail is a flotation device in water.

species.name: nosepass
species.flavor_text: Its magnetic nose consistently faces north. Travelers check NOSEPASS to get their bearings.

species.name: skitty
species.flavor_text: It is said to be difficult to earn its trust. However, it is extremely popular for its cute looks and behavior.

species.name: delcatty
species.flavor_text: The favorite of trend-conscious female TRAINERS, they are used in competition for their style and fur.

species.name: sableye
species.flavor_text: It feeds on gemstone crystals. In darkness, its eyes sparkle with the glitter of jewels.

species.name: mawile
species.flavor_text: It uses its docile-looking face to lull foes into complacency, then bites with its huge, relentless jaws.

species.name: aron
species.flavor_text: It eats iron to build its steel body. It is a pest that descends from mountains to eat bridges and train tracks.

species.name: lairon
species.flavor_text: It habitually shows off its strength with the size of sparks it creates by ramming its steel body into boulders.

species.name: aggron
species.flavor_text: It claims a large mountain as its sole territory. It mercilessly thrashes those that violate its space.

species.name: meditite
species.flavor_text: It never skips its daily yoga training. It heightens its inner strength through meditation.

species.name: medicham
species.flavor_text: It elegantly avoids attacks with dance- like steps, then launches a devastating blow in the same motion.

species.name: electrike
species.flavor_text: It stores static electricity in its fur for discharging. It gives off sparks if a storm approaches.

species.name: manectric
species.flavor_text: It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.

species.name: plusle
species.flavor_text: It cheers on partners while scattering sparks from its body. It climbs telephone poles to absorb electricity.

species.name: minun
species.flavor_text: Its dislike of water makes it take shelter under the eaves of houses in rain. It uses pom-poms made of sparks for cheering.

species.name: volbeat
species.flavor_text: It lives around clean ponds. At night, its rear lights up. It converses with others by flashing its light.

species.name: illumise
species.flavor_text: It guides VOLBEAT to draw signs in night skies. There are scientists that study the patterns it creates.

species.name: roselia
species.flavor_text: Its flowers give off a relaxing fragrance. The stronger its aroma, the healthier the ROSELIA is.

species.name: gulpin
species.flavor_text: There is nothing its stomach can’t digest. While it is digesting, vile, overpowering gases are expelled.

species.name: swalot
species.flavor_text: It can swallow a tire whole in one gulp. It secretes a horribly toxic fluid from the pores on its body.

species.name: carvanha
species.flavor_text: It lives in massive rivers that course through jungles. It swarms prey that enter its territory.

species.name: sharpedo
species.flavor_text: The ruffian of the seas, it has fangs that crunch through iron. It swims by jetting water from its rear.

species.name: wailmer
species.flavor_text: When it sucks in a large volume of seawater, it becomes like a big, bouncy ball. It eats a ton of food daily.

species.name: wailord
species.flavor_text: It is among the largest of all POKéMON. It herds prey in a pack then swallows the massed prey in one gulp.

species.name: numel
species.flavor_text: Magma of almost 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit courses through its body. When it grows cold, the magma hardens and slows it.

species.name: camerupt
species.flavor_text: If angered, the humps on its back erupt in a shower of molten lava. It lives in the craters of volcanoes.

species.name: torkoal
species.flavor_text: It burns coal inside its shell. If it is attacked, it belches thick, black smoke and flees.

species.name: spoink
species.flavor_text: It apparently dies if it stops bouncing about. It carries a pearl from CLAMPERL on its head.

species.name: grumpig
species.flavor_text: It can gain control over foes by doing odd dance steps. The black pearls on its forehead are precious gems.

species.name: spinda
species.flavor_text: No two SPINDA are said to have identical patterns. It confuses foes with its stumbling motions.

species.name: trapinch
species.flavor_text: It lives in arid deserts. It makes a sloping pit trap in sand where it patiently awaits prey.

species.name: vibrava
species.flavor_text: It generates ultrasonic waves by violently flapping its wings. After making its prey faint, it melts the prey with acid.

species.name: flygon
species.flavor_text: It hides itself by kicking up desert sand with its wings. Red covers shield its eyes from sand.

species.name: cacnea
species.flavor_text: It prefers harsh environments such as deserts. It can survive for 30 days on water stored in its body.

species.name: cacturne
species.flavor_text: It lives in deserts. It becomes active at night when it hunts for prey exhausted from the desert’s heat.

species.name: swablu
species.flavor_text: It constantly grooms its cotton-like wings. It takes a shower to clean itself if it becomes dirty.

species.name: altaria
species.flavor_text: If you hear a beautiful melody trilling deep among mountains far from people, it is ALTARIA’s humming.

species.name: zangoose
species.flavor_text: If it comes across a SEVIPER, its fur bristles and it assumes its battle pose. Its sharp claws are its best weapon.

species.name: seviper
species.flavor_text: It sharpens its swordlike tail on hard rocks. It hides in tall grass and strikes unwary prey with venomous fangs.

species.name: lunatone
species.flavor_text: Its health ebbs and flows with the lunar cycle. It brims with power when exposed to the light of the full moon.

species.name: solrock
species.flavor_text: It absorbs solar energy during the day. Always expressionless, it can sense what its foe is thinking.

species.name: barboach
species.flavor_text: It probes muddy riverbeds with its two long whiskers. A slimy film protects its body.

species.name: whiscash
species.flavor_text: It makes its nest at the bottom of swamps. It will eat anything - if it is alive, WHISCASH will eat it.

species.name: corphish
species.flavor_text: It came from overseas. It is a very hardy creature that will quickly proliferate, even in polluted streams.

species.name: crawdaunt
species.flavor_text: A rough customer that wildly flails its giant claws. It is said to be extremely hard to raise.

species.name: baltoy
species.flavor_text: It was discovered in ancient ruins. While moving, it constantly spins. It stands on one foot even when asleep.

species.name: claydol
species.flavor_text: It appears to have been born from clay dolls made by ancient people. It uses telekinesis to float and move.

species.name: lileep
species.flavor_text: It became extinct roughly 100 million years ago. It was regenerated from a fossil using advanced techniques.

species.name: cradily
species.flavor_text: It ensnares prey with its eight tentacles. It then melts the prey with a strong acid before feeding.

species.name: anorith
species.flavor_text: It is a kind of POKéMON progenitor. It uses its extending claws to catch prey hiding among rocks on the seafloor.

species.name: armaldo
species.flavor_text: Protected by a hard shell, its body is very sturdy. It skewers prey with its claws to feed.

species.name: feebas
species.flavor_text: Ridiculed for its shabby appearance, it is ignored by researchers. It lives in ponds choked with weeds.

species.name: milotic
species.flavor_text: MILOTIC is breathtakingly beautiful. Those that see it are said to forget their combative spirits.

species.name: castform
species.flavor_text: It has the ability to change its form into the sun, the rain, or a snow cloud, depending on the weather.

species.name: kecleon
species.flavor_text: It changes body color to blend in with its surroundings. It also changes color if it is happy or sad.

species.name: shuppet
species.flavor_text: It loves to feed on feelings like envy and malice. Its upright horn catches the emotions of people.

species.name: banette
species.flavor_text: Strong feelings of hatred turned a puppet into a POKéMON. If it opens its mouth, its cursed energy escapes.

species.name: duskull
species.flavor_text: Making itself invisible, it silently sneaks up to prey. It has the ability to slip through thick walls.

species.name: dusclops
species.flavor_text: Its body is entirely hollow. When it opens its mouth, it sucks everything in as if it were a black hole.

species.name: tropius
species.flavor_text: It lives in tropical jungles. The bunch of fruit around its neck is delicious. The fruit grows twice a year.

species.name: chimecho
species.flavor_text: It travels by riding on winds. It cleverly uses its long tail to pluck nuts and berries, which it loves to eat.

species.name: absol
species.flavor_text: It appears when it senses an impending natural disaster. As a result, it was mistaken as a doom-bringer.

species.name: wynaut
species.flavor_text: It tends to move in a pack with others. They cluster in a tight group to sleep in a cave.

species.name: snorunt
species.flavor_text: It is said that a home visited by a SNORUNT will prosper. It can withstand cold of minus 150 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: glalie
species.flavor_text: It has a body of ice that won’t melt, even with fire. It can instantly freeze moisture in the atmosphere.

species.name: spheal
species.flavor_text: Its body is covered in fluffy fur. The fur keeps it from feeling cold while it is rolling on ice.

species.name: sealeo
species.flavor_text: It touches new things with its nose to test for smell and feel. It plays by spinning SPHEAL on its nose.

species.name: walrein
species.flavor_text: It swims through icy seas while shattering ice floes with its large tusks. It is protected by its thick blubber.

species.name: clamperl
species.flavor_text: It is protected by a sturdy shell. Once in a lifetime, it makes a magnificent pearl.

species.name: huntail
species.flavor_text: It lives deep in the sea where no light ever filters down. It lights up its small fishlike tail to attract prey.

species.name: gorebyss
species.flavor_text: Its swimming form is exquisitely elegant. With its thin mouth, it feeds on seaweed that grows between rocks.

species.name: relicanth
species.flavor_text: It has remained unchanged for 100 million years. It was discovered during a deep-sea exploration.

species.name: luvdisc
species.flavor_text: During the spawning season, countless LUVDISC congregate at coral reefs, turning the waters pink.

species.name: bagon
species.flavor_text: Its steel-hard head can shatter boulders. It longingly hopes for wings to grow so it can fly.

species.name: shelgon
species.flavor_text: Its armored body makes all attacks bounce off. The armor is too tough, however, making it heavy and somewhat sluggish.

species.name: salamence
species.flavor_text: It becomes uncontrollable if it is enraged. It destroys everything with shredding claws and fire.

species.name: beldum
species.flavor_text: It uses magnetic waves to converse with its kind. All the cells in its body are magnetic.

species.name: metang
species.flavor_text: It floats midair using magnetism. Its body is so tough, even a crash with a jet plane won’t leave a scratch.

species.name: metagross
species.flavor_text: It is formed by two METANG fusing. Its four brains are said to be superior to a supercomputer.

species.name: regirock
species.flavor_text: It is entirely composed of rocks with no sign of a brain or heart. It is a mystery even to modern scientists.

species.name: regice
species.flavor_text: Research revealed that its body is made of the same kind of ice that is found at the South Pole.

species.name: registeel
species.flavor_text: It is sturdier than any kind of metal. It hardened due to pressure underground over tens of thousands of years.

species.name: latias
species.flavor_text: It can telepathically communicate with people. It changes its appearance using its down that refracts light.

species.name: latios
species.flavor_text: It has a docile temperament and dislikes fighting. Tucking in its forelegs, it can fly faster than a jet plane.

species.name: kyogre
species.flavor_text: This POKéMON is said to have expanded the sea by bringing heavy rains. It has the power to control water.

species.name: groudon
species.flavor_text: This legendary POKéMON is said to represent the land. It went to sleep after dueling KYOGRE.

species.name: rayquaza
species.flavor_text: It has lived for hundreds of millions of years in the ozone layer. Its flying form looks like a meteor.

species.name: jirachi
species.flavor_text: It is said to make any wish come true. It is awake for only seven days out of a thousand years.

species.name: deoxys
species.flavor_text: This DEOXYS has transformed into its aggressive guise. It can fool enemies by altering its appearance.
